_comment: Deterministic helpers for reading medication labels safely. Lantern extracts dosage/frequency patterns with regex (not model guesses) and ALWAYS appends the safety disclaimer. This powers the optional MedPsy / health-label feature and ties into the Psy track.
disclaimer: Lantern can read what is printed on a label, but it is not a medical device and can make mistakes. Always confirm the medicine name, dose, and instructions with a pharmacist or doctor before taking anything.
highAlertAdvice: This appears to be a high-alert medication where small mistakes can be serious. Please double-check the name and dose with a pharmacist.
